//: Shared project hooks. Cross-platform: bare `cargo`/`curl` invocations (on PATH everywhere), no shell operators or scripts. Runs from the session's project-root cwd. Personal/machine settings live in the gitignored settings.local.json.
//recall: SessionStart injects the junto-dev channel brief into agent context — the recall bridge until membership-time injection exists (docs/adr/0013). -sf fails silently when `junto serve` isn't running; -m 2 keeps a hung host from stalling session start.
